name: Coriander Fish (Bharia Machli)
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Sole, flounder, rock cod, or other white fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pat dry fish. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon salt inside and set aside. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Blend garlic, chili, ginger, half the coriander, coriander seeds, brown sugar, turmeric, mustard seeds, fenugreek seeds, salt, and lemon juice until it becomes a smooth paste (add water if needed).
3. Fry onions until soft and golden brown.
4. Add the blended masala and cook until most of the liquid is gone and it starts to leave the sides of the pan.
5. Add tomatoes and Garam Masala. Fry for 2 more minutes, then remove.
6. Coat one side of fish and stuff half a cup inside. Close the opening, spread the rest of the masala over it, cover tightly, and bake for about 25 minutes.
7. Grill for 1 or 2 minutes in broiler and sprinkle remaining coriander.
